matches.summary: Mexico dominated the opening match with a clinical performance. Julián Quiñones opened the scoring early, and Raúl Jiménez sealed the win in the second half. South Africa struggled to find their rhythm in front of a passionate home crowd.

A tightly contested match in Guadalajara. South Korea's late goals from Hwang In-Beom and Oh Hyeon-Gyu overturned a Czech lead established by Ladislav Krejcí. A crucial three points for the Taegeuk Warriors.
